title: Quran, Sura 24: An-Nur
description: Sura 24 (An-Nur: The Light) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 24 (An-Nur: The Light) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: God is the Light of the heavens and the earth. The example of His light is like a niche within which is a lamp; the lamp is within glass, the glass as if it were a pearly white star lit from a blessed olive tree.
